definition: Wearing clothes of a particular type.
e: She was dressed in a stunning red gown for the gala.

definition: To move or travel from one place to another.
e: I need to go to the store to buy some milk.

definition: An activity involving skill in making things by hand.
e: The museum features traditional wood-carving crafts.

definition: A large and important town.
e: New York is a city that never sleeps.

definition: The process of organizing things into groups.
e: The library uses a complex classification system for its books.

definition: The act of giving food to a person or animal.
e: The zookeeper is responsible for the daily feeding of the lions.

definition: Denoting the second of two things mentioned.
e: He offered me tea or coffee; I chose the latter.

definition: To communicate a thought or feeling in words.
e: It can be difficult to express your emotions clearly.

definition: A food made from the pressed curds of milk.
e: I love adding extra cheese to my homemade pizza.

definition: Living or occurring at the same time; modern.
e: The gallery features contemporary art from local artists.

definition: The final part of something.
e: The end of the movie was completely unexpected.

definition: To be composed or made up of.
e: The atmosphere consists mainly of nitrogen and oxygen.

definition: The act of closing something or the feeling that a situation has ended.
e: The closure of the factory led to many job losses.

definition: Unfriendly and ready to argue or fight.
e: The crowd became hostile when the speaker arrived late.

definition: A sum of money saved for a particular purpose.
e: We have started a scholarship fund for underprivileged students.

definition: To happen afterward or as a result.
e: After the announcement, a heated argument began to ensue.

definition: To repeat or reverberate after the original sound.
e: His footsteps began to echo in the empty hallway.

definition: The sweet and fleshy product of a tree or plant.
e: Eating fresh fruit every day is good for your health.

definition: To form a mental image of something not present.
e: Can you imagine what it would be like to live on Mars?

definition: To roughly calculate the value or number of something.
e: I estimate that the project will take three more weeks.

definition: The powdery residue left after something is burned.
e: The volcano erupted, covering the town in a layer of ash.

definition: A statement of money owed for goods or services.
e: The waiter brought the bill to our table after dinner.

definition: The movement of blood or air through a system.
e: Regular exercise helps to improve your blood circulation.

definition: Another time; once more.
e: If you don't succeed, you should always try again.

definition: A place where drinks are served; a long solid piece of something.
e: I bought a large bar of dark chocolate at the store.

definition: A person possessing a highly developed intellect.
e: The university attracts intellectuals from all over the world.

definition: The state of being unable to do something.
e: His inability to follow instructions caused many problems.

definition: An association or organization for a specific activity.
e: She decided to join the local chess club to improve her skills.

definition: A fundamental part or aspect of something.
e: Trust is a crucial element in any successful friendship.

definition: To have a strong desire to achieve something high.
e: Many young athletes aspire to compete in the Olympics.

definition: Made of or resembling the yellow precious metal.
e: She wore a beautiful gold necklace for the wedding.

definition: The underlying support or foundation for an idea.
e: The report provides the basis for our future strategy.

definition: A firm hold or tight grasp on something.
e: He maintained a firm grip on the steering wheel during the rain.

definition: Used or intended to defend or protect.
e: The team took a defensive position to protect their lead.

definition: Feeling very happy and enthusiastic.
e: The children were very excited about the trip to the zoo.

definition: In the time following an event.
e: We went for a walk after we finished our lunch.

definition: A hinged barrier used to close an opening in a wall or fence.
e: Please remember to close the garden gate behind you.

definition: Exactly; only a very short time ago.
e: I have just finished my homework for tomorrow.

definition: To achieve or complete something successfully.
e: If we work together, we can accomplish anything.

definition: A person who helps someone in a higher position.
e: The store manager is looking for a new shop assistant.

definition: To encourage the development of something.
e: The project aims to foster better relations between the neighbors.

definition: A person who writes for newspapers or news websites.
e: The journalist interviewed the mayor about the new park.

definition: To place someone or something apart from others.
e: The patient was moved to a separate room to isolate the virus.

definition: Feeling shame or guilt about something.
e: He felt ashamed of his behavior at the party.

definition: By itself, without direct human control.
e: The lights turn on automatically when you enter the room.

definition: An individual feature, fact, or item.
e: She explained every detail of the plan to the committee.

definition: To have a commanding influence on; exercise control over.
e: The tall building began to dominate the city skyline.

definition: A thing that is wrongly perceived by the senses.
e: The magician created the illusion that he was floating.

definition: The organ inside the head that controls thought and memory.
e: The human brain is the most complex organ in the body.

definition: To persist in an activity or process.
e: We will continue the meeting after a short break.
